info.title: WDIAG — Where Did It All Go

post.description:
Register a new user with local credentials.

Returns a RegisterResponse with has_household and redirect routing hints.
Returns RFC 9457 Problem Details (403) if registration is blocked.
Authenticate with local credentials and receive session cookies.
Rotate the refresh token (sliding-window idle timeout).
Revoke all refresh tokens for the current user and clear cookies.
Grant step-up elevation for App Admin actions (5-minute window).

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile.

post.description: Begin TOTP enrollment — returns a provisioning URI and raw secret for QR-code display.
Confirm TOTP enrollment with the first generated code.

delete.description: Disable TOTP for the current user.

get.description: Return all active refresh tokens (sessions) for the current user.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api V1 Auth Sessions Get

delete.description: Revoke a specific refresh token (session) for the current user.

post.description: Change the current user's password. Revokes all active sessions.

get.description: List all households the current user is a member of.

schema.title: Response List Households Api V1 Households Get

post.description: Create a new household. The creator becomes the owner.

get.description: Return household details (actor must be a member).

patch.description:
Update household settings (actor must be owner).

When home_currency changes, enqueues recompute_fx_conversions_job and
returns recompute_started=true. Clients should show a recalculating banner
until the fx_recompute_complete SSE event is received.

delete.description: Soft-delete (archive) a household (actor must be owner).

get.description: List all active members of the household.

schema.title: Response List Members Api V1 Households  Household Id  Members Get

post.description: Add a user to the household (requires step-up auth + App Admin).

delete.description: Remove a member from the household (requires step-up auth + App Admin).

post.description: Create a household invitation (owner or app_admin).

get.description: List invitations for this household (owner or app_admin).

schema.title: Response List Invitations Api V1 Households  Household Id  Invitations  Get

post.description: Reset invite expiry and reattempt email delivery (owner or app_admin).
Revoke a pending invitation (owner or app_admin).

get.description: Return public invitation metadata. Token is NOT included in response.

post.description: Accept an invitation. Requires authentication; validates email match.
Decline an invitation. No email match required.

get.description: Return SMTP configuration status (no auth required, non-sensitive).

Return public registration configuration.

No authentication required — used by RegisterPage and WaitingPage.

schema.title: Response Get Registration Settings Api V1 Settings Registration Get

get.description:
Server-Sent Events stream for household-level notifications.

Emits events: household_assigned, read_only_changed.
Keepalive comment every 30s to prevent proxy timeouts.
Paginated audit log for the household, newest first.
Full audit history for a specific entity, oldest first.

schema.title: Response Get Entity Audit History Api V1 Households  Household Id  Audit Entities  Entity Type   Entity Id  Get

get.description: Reconstruct entity state by replaying RFC 6902 patches from the audit log.
Return the root event and all reversal events linked via source_event_id.

schema.title: Response Get Reversal Chain Api V1 Households  Household Id  Audit  Event Id  Reversals Get

get.description: List accounts in the household, optionally filtered by type or manual flag.

schema.title: Response List Accounts Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts  Get

post.description: Create a new account.

get.description: Return account details.
List all account groups in the household.

schema.title: Response List Account Groups Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts Groups  Get

post.description: Create an account group, optionally linking initial member accounts.

get.description:
Return candidate account pairs for HITL grouping review.

Detection heuristic: same institution + same balance + same currency +
name similarity ≥ 60%. Does NOT auto-merge; confirmation is a separate write.

schema.title: Response Find Group Candidates Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts Groups Candidates Get

get.description: Return account group details.

patch.description: Update account group name or membership metadata.

post.description: Link an account to a group (HITL confirmation of a detected candidate).

delete.description: Remove an account from a group.

get.description:
Return one balance reading per day for the last 90 days from the audit log.

Returns an empty list if no reconciliation entries exist for this account.

schema.title: Response Get Balance History Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts  Account Id  Balance History Get

get.description: Return the debt annotation for an account.

post.description: Annotate a debt account with payment strategy and initial APR tranche.

patch.description: Update debt account payment strategy and scheduling fields.

get.description: Return full APR history for a debt account, ordered by effective_from.

schema.title: Response List Debt Balances Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts  Account Id  Debt Balances Get

post.description: Add a new APR tranche, closing the current one in the effective-dated chain.

get.description: List transactions for a specific account.

schema.title: Response List Transactions For Account Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts  Account Id  Transactions  Get

post.description: Create a transaction via manual entry.

get.description: Return transaction detail with splits.

patch.description: Set or clear the user note on a transaction.

post.description: Replace all splits on a transaction.

schema.title: Response Set Splits For Account Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts  Account Id  Transactions  Transaction Id  Splits Post

post.description: Link two transactions as an internal or external transfer.

schema.title: Response Pair Transfer For Account Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts  Account Id  Transactions  Transaction Id  Transfer Pair Post

get.description: Return credit transactions that could be refunds of this debit.

schema.title: Response Get Refund Candidates Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts  Account Id  Transactions  Transaction Id  Refund Candidates Get

post.description: Confirm a refund pairing (HITL write).

schema.title: Response Pair Refund For Account Api V1 Households  Household Id  Accounts  Account Id  Transactions  Transaction Id  Refund Pair Post

get.description: List all transactions in the household (cross-account).

schema.title: Response List Transactions Cross Account Api V1 Households  Household Id  Transactions  Get

get.description: Return pending dedup candidate pairs for HITL review.

schema.title: Response List Dedup Candidates Api V1 Households  Household Id  Transactions Dedup Candidates Get

post.description: Accept a merge or reject a dedup candidate pair.

get.description: Return transaction detail with splits (cross-account).

patch.description: Set or clear the user note on a transaction (cross-account).

post.description: Replace all splits on a transaction (cross-account).

schema.title: Response Set Splits Cross Account Api V1 Households  Household Id  Transactions  Transaction Id  Splits Post

post.description: Link two transactions as an internal or external transfer (cross-account).

schema.title: Response Pair Transfer Cross Account Api V1 Households  Household Id  Transactions  Transaction Id  Transfer Pair Post

post.description: Confirm a refund pairing (cross-account).

schema.title: Response Pair Refund Cross Account Api V1 Households  Household Id  Transactions  Transaction Id  Refund Pair Post

get.description: List all payment groups in the household.

schema.title: Response List Payment Groups Api V1 Households  Household Id  Payment Groups  Get

post.description: Create a payment group from confirmed candidate transactions.

get.description: Return payment group details.

patch.description:
Override the FX rate on a foreign-currency transaction.

Sets fx_rate_source=manual. Recomputes home_currency_amount.
Does NOT update the platform_fx_rate table (market rates only).

schema.title: Response List Categories Api V1 Households  Household Id  Categories Get
Response List Tags Api V1 Households  Household Id  Tags Get
Response List Rules Api V1 Households  Household Id  Rules Get
Response Reorder Rules Api V1 Households  Household Id  Rules Reorder Post
Response List Income Sources Api V1 Households  Household Id  Income Sources Get

post.description: Enqueue a bulk reclassification job. Returns immediately with a job ID.

schema.title: Response List Sync Configs Api V1 Households  Household Id  Ingest Sync Configs  Get

post.description: Enqueue sync_account_job for a SimpleFIN sync config. Returns job ID.

get.description:
Fetch SimpleFIN accounts for a SyncConfig and return preview with suggested types.

Result is cached in Redis for 5 minutes to avoid repeated SimpleFIN calls.
Does NOT create any system accounts.

schema.title: Response Preview Simplefin Accounts Api V1 Households  Household Id  Ingest Sync Configs  Config Id  Preview Get

post.description:
Save account mapping decisions for a SimpleFIN SyncConfig.

Creates new accounts, maps existing accounts, or ignores SimpleFIN accounts.
Sets authoritative_sync_config_id on mapped/created accounts.
Triggers initial 90-day sync job on first mapping save.

Accept a multipart OFX/QFX or CSV upload, enqueue processing job.

File bytes are read in-memory, base64-encoded, and sent to the ARQ job.
The bytes are NOT stored in the database.
csv_config: JSON-encoded column mapping config (required for csv_upload).

get.description: Return recent import jobs for the household.

schema.title: Response List Import Jobs Api V1 Households  Household Id  Ingest Jobs  Get
Response List Recurrences Api V1 Households  Household Id  Recurrences Get
Response List Matches Api V1 Households  Household Id  Recurrences  Recurrence Id  Matches Get
Response List Candidates Api V1 Households  Household Id  Recurrences Candidates Get
Response Get Expected Events Api V1 Households  Household Id  Recurrences Expected Get
Response List Recommendations Api V1 Households  Household Id  Recommendations Get
Response List Auto Apply Rules Api V1 Households  Household Id  Recommendations Auto Apply Get
Response List Budgets Api V1 Households  Household Id  Budgets Get
Response List Budget History Api V1 Households  Household Id  Budgets  Budget Id  History Get
Response List Budget Lines Api V1 Households  Household Id  Budgets  Budget Id  Lines Get
Response List Periods Api V1 Households  Household Id  Budgets  Budget Id  Periods Get

post.description: Manually trigger actuals recompute for the current period.

schema.title: Response List Plans Api V1 Households  Household Id  Debt Plans Get
Response List Plan History Api V1 Households  Household Id  Debt Plans  Plan Id  History Get
Response Get Schedule Api V1 Households  Household Id  Debt Plans  Plan Id  Schedule Get
Response All Goals Status Api V1 Households  Household Id  Goals Status Get
Response List Goals Api V1 Households  Household Id  Goals Get
Response List Goal History Api V1 Households  Household Id  Goals  Goal Id  History Get
Response List Funding Sources Api V1 Households  Household Id  Goals  Goal Id  Funding Sources  Get

get.description: Run or return cached base projection.
List projected events with optional filters.

schema.title: Response List Events Api V1 Households  Household Id  Projections Events Get
Response Get Balance Curve Api V1 Households  Household Id  Projections Balance Curve Get
Response Get Cashflow Api V1 Households  Household Id  Projections Cashflow Get
Response Get Net Worth Api V1 Households  Household Id  Projections Net Worth Get
Response List Breaches Api V1 Households  Household Id  Projections Breaches Get
Response Get Calendar Events Api V1 Households  Household Id  Projections Calendar Events Get
Response List Scenarios Api V1 Households  Household Id  Projections Scenarios Get
Response List Providers Api V1 Households  Household Id  Insights Providers Get

get.description:
List models installed on the configured Ollama instance.

Returns empty list (not 400) if Ollama is unreachable.
Returns 400 if no Ollama provider is configured.

post.description: Pull a model from Ollama registry. Streams SSE progress events.

delete.description: Delete a locally installed Ollama model. model_name may contain colons.

post.description:
Check whether a specific provider config is reachable.

Always returns 200. Never raises on connection failure.

schema.title: Response List Audit Api V1 Households  Household Id  Insights Audit Get

post.description: Enqueue the insight generation job. Returns job_id for polling.

get.description:
Return all currencies supported by the Frankfurter API.

No auth required. Cached in Redis for 24 hours.

schema.title: Response List Currencies Api V1 Currencies Get

get.description:
Look up an FX rate for a currency pair and date.

Requires authentication. Stores the rate if fetched from Frankfurter.
Returns is_approximate=true when using a fallback rate.

Return instance metadata. No authentication required.

Used by the login page to detect AIO/demo mode and show credentials.

AcceptInviteResponse.title: AcceptInviteResponse
AcceptInviteResponse.description: Response to a successful invitation accept.

AccountGroupCreate.title: AccountGroupCreate
AccountGroupCreate.description: Create an account group, optionally with initial members.

AccountGroupOut.title: AccountGroupOut
AccountGroupOut.description: Account group info returned in responses.

AddMemberRequest.title: AddMemberRequest
AddMemberRequest.description: Add an existing user to a household (requires step-up auth).

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: no_provider | budget_exceeded | disabled (present when answer is null)

AuditOperation.title: AuditOperation
AuditOperation.description:
What operation was performed. Values stored as lowercase strings in the DB.

Uppercase member names avoid conflicts with str built-in methods
(e.g. str.split, str.update do not exist, but being explicit is safer).

BalanceHistoryPoint.title: BalanceHistoryPoint
BalanceHistoryPoint.description: One balance reading per day, derived from audit log reconciliation entries.

ChangePasswordRequest.title: ChangePasswordRequest
ChangePasswordRequest.description: Change the current user's local auth password.

DebtAnnotationCreate.title: DebtAnnotationCreate
DebtAnnotationCreate.description: Annotate a debt account with payment strategy and initial APR tranche.

DebtAnnotationOut.title: DebtAnnotationOut
DebtAnnotationOut.description: Debt annotation info returned in responses.

DebtBalanceCreate.title: DebtBalanceCreate
DebtBalanceCreate.description: Add a new APR tranche, closing the current one.

DebtBalanceOut.title: DebtBalanceOut
DebtBalanceOut.description: Debt balance (APR tranche) info returned in responses.

DedupResolveRequest.title: DedupResolveRequest
DedupResolveRequest.description: Resolve a pending dedup candidate as merged or rejected.

DeduplicationLogOut.title: DeduplicationLogOut
DeduplicationLogOut.description: Dedup candidate pair returned in responses.

GroupCandidateOut.title: GroupCandidateOut
GroupCandidateOut.description: Candidate account pair surfaced for HITL grouping review.

HouseholdUpdateOut.title: HouseholdUpdateOut
HouseholdUpdateOut.description:
Household info returned after a PATCH update.

recompute_started=True when home_currency changed and the FX recompute
job was successfully enqueued. Clients should show a recalculating banner
until the fx_recompute_complete SSE event is received.

InvitationOut.title: InvitationOut
InvitationOut.description: Invitation info returned to household owners.

InviteMetadataOut.title: InviteMetadataOut
InviteMetadataOut.description: Public metadata for the accept page (token never exposed).

PaymentGroupCreate.title: PaymentGroupCreate
PaymentGroupCreate.description: Create a payment group from confirmed candidate transactions.

PaymentGroupOut.title: PaymentGroupOut
PaymentGroupOut.description: Payment group info returned in responses.

RefundCandidateOut.title: RefundCandidateOut
RefundCandidateOut.description: A candidate credit transaction that could be a refund.

RefundPairRequest.title: RefundPairRequest
RefundPairRequest.description: Link this transaction to its refund counterpart.

RegisterRequest.title: RegisterRequest
RegisterRequest.description: Register a new user with local auth credentials.

RegisterResponse.title: RegisterResponse
RegisterResponse.description:
Response body for POST /auth/register.

Extends TokenResponse with post-registration routing hints.

ScenarioOverride.title: ScenarioOverride
ScenarioOverride.description: One delta applied on top of base projection inputs.

SessionOut.title: SessionOut
SessionOut.description: Active refresh token (session) info returned in responses.

SimplefinAccountPreview.title: SimplefinAccountPreview
SimplefinAccountPreview.description: One SimpleFIN account returned by the preview endpoint.

SplitAllocationIn.title: SplitAllocationIn
SplitAllocationIn.description: One slice in a set-splits request.

SplitAllocationOut.title: SplitAllocationOut
SplitAllocationOut.description: Split allocation info returned in responses.

SplitsSetRequest.title: SplitsSetRequest
SplitsSetRequest.description: Replace all splits on a transaction.

StepUpRequest.title: StepUpRequest
StepUpRequest.description: Step-up authentication — re-enter password or provide TOTP.

SyncConfigCreate.title: SyncConfigCreate
SyncConfigCreate.description:
Create a SimpleFIN sync configuration.

For SimpleFIN: supply setup_token (exchanged immediately for access_url) and label.
setup_token is one-time-use and never stored.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: Response body for auth endpoints (tokens are in httpOnly cookies).

TransactionCreate.title: TransactionCreate
TransactionCreate.description: Create a transaction via manual entry (no ingest wiring).

TransactionFXRateUpdate.title: TransactionFXRateUpdate
TransactionFXRateUpdate.description: Override the FX rate on a transaction.

TransactionNoteUpdate.title: TransactionNoteUpdate
TransactionNoteUpdate.description: Set or clear the user note on a transaction.

TransactionOut.title: TransactionOut
TransactionOut.description: Transaction info returned in list and detail responses.

TransferPairRequest.title: TransferPairRequest
TransferPairRequest.description: Link two transactions as an internal or external transfer.

UpdateProfileRequest.title: UpdateProfileRequest
UpdateProfileRequest.description: Update mutable fields on the authenticated user's profile.

VisibilityMode.title: VisibilityMode
VisibilityMode.description: Controls what financial data household members can see.
